description: Install husky and lint-staged as devDependencies. Run pnpm exec husky init. Configure .husky/pre-commit to run pnpm exec lint-staged. Configure lint-staged in package.json to run eslint --fix and prettier --write on *.ts/*.js files, and prettier --write on *.json/*.md files. Committing files with lint errors must be blocked.
title: Add Husky pre-commit hooks with lint-staged

descriptionHistory.description: Install husky and lint-staged as devDependencies. Run pnpm exec husky init. Configure .husky/pre-commit to run pnpm exec lint-staged. Configure lint-staged in package.json to run eslint --fix and prettier --write on *.ts/*.js files, and prettier --write on *.json/*.md files. Committing files with lint errors must be blocked.
